children.text: Apply when the facility is seeking a waiver of the 2.4 CNA requirement to meet individual patient needs but will provide a minimum of 3.5 direct care service hours. Facilities may only submit one Patient Needs Waiver and/or one Workforce Shortage Waiver application in the same year. If submitting both, only one may be approved.

children.text: Applies to individualized patient care plan modifications based on clinical needs

children.text: Documented patient or family request for accommodation required

attributes.class: lucide lucide-check h-4 w-4 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5

children.text: Clinical assessment supporting the modification must be on file

attributes.class: lucide lucide-check h-4 w-4 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5

children.text: Interdisciplinary team agreement and approval is required

Apply when the facility is seeking program flexibility to regulations. The request must include justification for the program flexibility, adequate description of the alternative concept, and documentation supporting that patient care will not be compromised. The facility may request program flexibility that is intended to be emergency or routine. An approved program flexibility request is for a limited term with a start and an end date. Facilities may submit more than one application as needed.

children.text: Submit a detailed justification demonstrating how the alternative maintains compliance and protects residents

children.text: All requests must be submitted online through WaiverPRO

children.text: CDPH will respond within 60 days after all required documentation is received

children.text: Approved flexibilities include an expiration date and specific terms; may be revoked if conditions are not met

children.text: This waiver was available from Dec 29, 2025 to Apr 30, 2026

Apply when the facility is seeking a waiver of the 3.5 direct care service hours requirement and/or the 2.4 CNA hours requirement due to a workforce shortage of available and appropriate health care professionals and direct care givers. Facilities may only submit one Patient Needs Waiver and/or one Workforce Shortage Waiver application in the same year. If submitting both, only one may be approved.

lucide lucide-check h-4 w-4 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5

children.text: Facilities may not staff below 3.2 direct care hours per patient day, even with an approved waiver

attributes.class: lucide lucide-check h-4 w-4 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5

children.text: Only licensed freestanding SNFs (excluding GACH distinct parts, state-owned hospitals, and developmental centers) may apply

attributes.class: lucide lucide-check h-4 w-4 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5

children.text: Application Window: January 1 – April 1 annually; applications will not be accepted outside this timeframe

attributes.class: lucide lucide-check h-4 w-4 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5

children.text: One Workforce Shortage Waiver and/or one Patient Needs Waiver per year; only one may be approved
